prompts.title: Space Colony
prompts.prompt:
Use photo references for all faces.

No altering face. 100% similar to the reference images.

Create a highly detailed ultra-realistic Eid al-Fitr family portrait with a luxurious and elegant Islamic aesthetic, vertical composition 9:16.

Scene Composition

A warm Indonesian Muslim family scene where three family members peek from behind an elegant black front wall panel on the right side of the frame.

They are arranged vertically from top to bottom: father, mother, daughter, all using their respective reference images.

All three are gently smiling toward the camera, expressing warmth, kindness, and the joyful spirit of Eid al-Fitr.

Characters

Father (top)

Adult Indonesian man [use reference image 1].

Wearing an elegant black peci (kopiah) and a luxury black baju koko with subtle tone-on-tone black embroidery.

Short dark brown hair slightly visible on the sides of the peci.

Warm, friendly smile.

Mother (middle)

Beautiful Indonesian woman [use reference image 2].

Hair styled in a neat low bun, wearing an elegant black sheer shawl (hijab).

Dressed in a luxury black Muslim outfit with detailed black embroidery.

Soft natural makeup with pink lipstick.

Graceful expression and warm smile.

Daughter (bottom)

Young Indonesian girl [use reference image 3].

In high ponytail with bangs, partially covered with a sheer shawl matching the mother’s.

Wearing a luxurious black abaya with delicate embroidery similar to the mother’s outfit.

Cheerful, friendly expression with a sweet smile.

All outfits appear luxurious, refined, and neatly designed, with delicate embroidery details.

Typography

Elegant serif typography combined with Islamic calligraphy style.

All text appears in gold color to contrast beautifully with the black background.

Displayed text:

“Selamat Hari Raya”

“IDUL FITRI”

“1 Syawal 1447 H”

“Minal Aidzin Walfaidzin”

“Mohon Maaf Lahir & Batin”

“Lestijoe & Keluarga”

Decorations

Minimalist yet luxurious Islamic decorative elements:

crescent moon ornaments

elegant lanterns

large white vase filled with black decorative branches

green ketupat ornaments as the only bright contrasting color in the composition

The ketupat should have highly realistic woven texture.

Background & Atmosphere

An elegant all-black Islamic interior with subtle matte arabesque patterns and softly reflective decorative elements.

The atmosphere feels modern, luxurious, and exclusive, perfect for an Eid celebration.

Lighting

Soft and dramatic studio lighting, with gentle highlights that enhance the texture of the black fabrics and facial features, creating a luxury Eid celebration mood.

Photography Style

Ultra-realistic

8K resolution

extremely sharp facial details

natural skin texture

professional studio lighting

shallow depth of field

Canon EOS R5 look

high contrast

cinematic lighting

high dynamic range

luxury editorial Eid portrait photography
prompts.author: Space Pioneers
